nasb.text: The Lord has made Himself known; He has executed judgment. In the work of his own hands the wicked is snared. Higgaion Selah.

esv.text: The Lord has made himself known; he has executed judgment; the wicked are snared in the work of their own hands. Higgaion.  Selah

cnv.text: 耶和華已經把自己顯明，又施行了審判； 惡人被自己手所作的纏住了。

ccb.text: 耶和华彰显了自己的公义， 使恶人自食其果。（细拉）

csbs.text: 耶和华显明自己，施行公正； 恶人因自己手所做的陷入圈套。希加永　细拉
